summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Part A Bug Fixes and Part B Features. All 15 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All Part A bug fixes and Part B features implemented correctly and working
seed_data_creation: Created UI Test user during frontend testing (uitest1772032042@example.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Part A bug fixes verified: A-1 (Admin Create User shows success), A-2 (Transaction history generated with transactions_generated > 0), A-4 (KYC page not in ProtectedRoute - accessible via token), A-6 (fee_paid:true persists correctly). All Part B features verified: B-1 (datetime-local picker in Add Transaction modal), B-2 (available-balance endpoint returns total/available/locked per asset, USDC card shows 'Avail:' when different from total), B-3 (action-eligibility endpoint returns send/withdraw_usdc/withdraw_eur/swap eligibility), B-4 (notifications endpoint works, notification bell shows unread count badge), B-5 (SSE endpoint exists at /api/events/stream?token=xxx). MOCKED: Send/Swap/Withdraw actions show toast messages since this is a simulated platform.

verified_features.Bug A-1: Admin Create User returns ok:true and shows success toast - VERIFIED
verified_features.Bug A-2: Transaction history generated when creating user with balance/dates - VERIFIED (transactions_generated > 0)
verified_features.Bug A-4: KYC page accessible via token URL - VERIFIED (/kyc route is NOT in ProtectedRoute)
verified_features.Bug A-6: fee_paid:true persists correctly in admin transaction creation - VERIFIED
verified_features.Feature B-1: datetime-local picker in Add Transaction modal - VERIFIED (Date & Time field)
verified_features.Feature B-1.2: Fee amount always visible even when paid - VERIFIED (Fee and Fee Status fields in modal)
verified_features.Feature B-2: Available balance endpoint works - VERIFIED (returns total/available/locked per asset)
verified_features.Feature B-2.2: USDC asset card shows Available when different from total - VERIFIED (shows 'Avail: $750.00')
verified_features.Feature B-3: Action eligibility endpoint works - VERIFIED (returns send/withdraw_usdc/withdraw_eur/swap)
verified_features.Feature B-4.2: Notification bell with unread count badge - VERIFIED
verified_features.Feature B-5: SSE endpoint exists - VERIFIED (/api/events/stream?token=xxx returns text/event-stream)
verified_features.Send modal: Shows Total vs Available balance and locked (unpaid fees) - VERIFIED
verified_features.Withdraw modal: Shows USDC and EUR sections - VERIFIED

mocked_apis.note: Send, Swap, and Withdraw actions in the frontend are MOCKED (show toast messages only)
